CustomField.description: This formula calculates the age of roof based on the Year Roof Installed field.
CustomField.formula: IF(VALUE( HOMEtracker__Year_Roof_Installed__c ) <= YEAR(TODAY()), YEAR(TODAY()) - VALUE(HOMEtracker__Year_Roof_Installed__c ), NULL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula calculates the age of roof based on the Year Roof Installed field.
CustomField.label: Age of Roof
